pr_text:
## Title: Fix IQ sample accumulation timing to ensure minimum 1ms wait

### Summary
The IQ samples time source thread was using integer division to calculate the number of samples required for a 1ms wait period. The calculation `iq_samples_per_second / 1000` could truncate fractional milliseconds when the sample rate wasn't a multiple of 1000, causing the thread to wake up prematurely with less than 1ms of accumulated samples. This violated 3GPP timing requirements for protocol timers downstream
